steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the opening word of a sentence. The sentence sets up a contrast: Daumier's painting focuses on something "decidedly mundane" (working-class rail travelers) "instead" of something else. The blank must describe Daumier's relationship to that something else — the "mythological and heroic subject matter" of painters like Vernet. The blank needs a word meaning deliberately avoiding or rejecting that subject matter.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Eschewing: means deliberately avoiding or rejecting. Daumier rejects the mythological subject matter and paints something mundane instead. ✓
  • Choice B — Expounding: means elaborating on or explaining in detail. This says Daumier is explaining the mythological subject matter — the opposite of rejecting it, and contradicts "instead." ✗
  • Choice C — Caricaturing: means mocking by exaggeration. This says Daumier is distorting the mythological subject matter, not avoiding it — still engaged with it rather than turning away from it. ✗
  • Choice D — Appraising: means evaluating or assessing. This says Daumier is judging the mythological subject matter, which doesn't match the contrast or the word "instead." ✗
That matches Choice A — Eschewing.
